case_title: NASSER ARIGAT VS. DR. CALVIN LEE

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ARIGAT, NASSER LEE, DR. CALVIN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DR. CALVIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF NASSER ARIGAT APPEARED. DEFENDANT DR. CALVIN LEE APPEARED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. BOTH EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY ARIGAT, NASSER AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DR. CALVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARIGAT, NASSER AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DR. CALVIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARIGAT, NASSER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, DR. CALVIN $618.87 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $663.87, PLAINTIFF PAID $2475.50 FOR CERTAIN DENTAL WORK. 75% OF THE WORK WAS PERFORMED. PLAINITFF IS ENTITLED TO A 25% REFUND FOR THE WORK NOT PERFORMED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-19-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DR. CALVIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.
